steps.title: Set up
steps.content: A linear function $f$ passes through $(4, 190)$ and $(10, 670)$. Find the slope, then the equation, and match to a choice.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — $f(x) = 180x - 670$: $f(4) = 720 - 670 = 50 eq 190$. ✗
  • Choice B — $f(x) = 67x$: $f(4) = 268 eq 190$. ✗
  • Choice C — $f(x) = 80x - 10x$: This simplifies to $70x$. $f(4) = 280 eq 190$. ✗
  • Choice D — $f(x) = 80x - 130$: $f(4) = 320 - 130 = 190$ ✓ and $f(10) = 800 - 130 = 670$ ✓. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
